about.title: THE RUNNER RUNNER STORY
about.text: In a world where speed is everything, only the strategic survive. Join the ultimate competitive race across the neon city streets.

features.title: HIGH SPEED RACING
features.description: Experience the adrenaline of high-stakes racing in beautiful 3D environments.

features.title: POWERUP MASTERY
features.description: Master shields, magnets, and blasters to gain the edge over your competition.

features.title: GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS
features.description: Compete with players worldwide and claim your spot at the top of the rankings.
